title: selago setulosa
intro: Selago setulosa, also known as the bearded Cape primrose, is a flowering plant native to South Africa that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selago setulosa include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
